name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Critical File Modification
notes: This Building Block detects any modifications (including creation or deletions) of critical file or directories.
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Critical File Modification on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
BB:CategoryDefinition: Critical Files and Directories for Endpoint
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Operating System

when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Successful File Modification, Audit.Object Modification Success, Audit.Object Modification Attempt, System.File Created, System.File Deleted
when an event matches any of the following BB:CategoryDefinition: Critical Files and Directories for Endpoint
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Critical File Modification on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Operating System

AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Successful File Modification, Audit.Object Modification Success, Audit.Object Modification Attempt, System.File Created, System.File Deleted
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:CategoryDefinition: Critical Files and Directories for Endpoint
